summary: Test suite focuses on act integration and workflow structure but lacks isolated unit testing of core functions. No tests for error paths (missing files, invalid JSON, malformed input), edge cases (empty manifests, special characters, case sensitivity), or -FailOnDenied flag behavior. Violates test independence: single act run feeds 10+ assertions instead of independent tests. Tests claim TDD methodology but were written after implementation with no evidence of test-first approach. Missing direct Pester testing of Get-DependenciesFromManifest, Get-LicenseConfig, Get-ComplianceStatus, etc. Fixture files assumed valid but never validated. Would only catch regressions in happy path and workflow structure; would miss most logic bugs and error-handling defects.
